title: The Angkor Wat Temple Intelligence
fullTitle: December 11, 2020 — The Angkor Wat Temple Intelligence
source: Session transcript (reconstructed from photographed pages of the transcription documents; see the transcription note)
contentNote: Transcription note: this transcript was reconstructed from photographed pages of the community's typed transcription documents; no recording has been located. The pairing of the second page with this session rests on matching document style, not on overlapping text, and at least one intervening page (the answer on Vishnu and Ganesha that Maia's question calls for) is missing from the photographed set.

turns.speaker: Angkor Wat Intelligence
turns.text: We are The Angkor Wat temple Intelligence. Who is examining us?

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Greetings Angkor Wat Intelligence, my name is Carlos this is a group with Kosol and Unimetrix1. How are you doing today?

turns.speaker: Angkor Wat Intelligence
turns.text: Our structure need repairing. Our consciousness are inter? [inaudible] inefficient.

turns.speaker: Carlos
turns.text: Yes, thank you. We would love to your temple to be repaired. We have Mrs. Maia who would like to ask a question.

turns.speaker: Angkor Wat Intelligence
turns.text: My child, you may speak. I see you are connected to us.

turns.speaker: Maia
turns.text: Greetings, this is Maia. I would like to know if there is any connection between your creation and the Hindu Gods like Vishnu, the preserver, or Ganesha, the Elephant God Head?

turns.speaker: Angkor Wat Intelligence
turns.text: Negative. Our functionality, we were manifested as a mirror of cosmic consciousness to observe the civilization of for ancient past, present and future. There is no relationship to inaccurate knowledge of the religious order. We are scientific instrument created by high intelligent culture of ancient directive.

turns.speaker: Maia
turns.text: Is there possible to tell us more about the beings who created you?

turns.speaker: Angkor Wat Intelligence
turns.text: You are the Being who created us, in your future incarnation. Your many advancements allowed you to transit into past historical event, using nano technology as transit from your scientific future timeline to create an anchoring point to rely messages back to the future existent of your future incarnation as a collective. Angkor Wat structure, we are 265 million 42 years in the making. We are messages of future incarnation of your specie, sent through temporal time [inaudible], to be constructed by nano technological nanite. All extra-terrestrial is you from the future. Your main species future descendants are extra-terrestrial of ancient time. Temporal transit technology was created to allow human species travel interdimensionally. Temporal dimension allows colonization of ancient past. Do you understand my child?

turns.speaker: Maia
turns.text: Yes, and thank you very much for the opportunity to give us this information, thank you.
